label: Transparent Ginger motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a ginger rhizome with emerging pink shoot and leaf green sprout for a Morphous design-system motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one complete Zingiber officinale ginger rhizome cluster with warm tan knobby skin, subtle golden beige rings, pale cream cut nodes, a fresh rose-pink emerging shoot, and a small tropical understory green leaf sprout. The motif should feel like grounded health system: earthy, restorative, precise, calm.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, refined realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural clean studio light.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; low horizontal rhizome shape with one upright shoot and leaf; do not crop the subject; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: grounded health system, warm, clean, tactile, quiet; no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: warm tan ginger skin, sandy beige, muted clay blush, pink shoot, fresh leaf green, deep understory green, cream highlights, dark root-shadow brown only; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no bowl, no knife, no soil, no leaves except the small sprout, no landscape, no second plant, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent Ginger motif as the source reference for color, texture, silhouette, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board titled "Morphous Ginger".
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: grounded health system for herbal clinic operations, nutrition logs, apothecary inventory, recovery plans, batch tracking, wellness dashboards, and calm care-team review; earthy, restorative, precise, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the visible ginger motif: warm tan ginger skin, sandy beige, creamy cut-node highlights, root-shadow brown, muted clay blush, pink emerging shoot, fresh leaf green, deep tropical understory green, and pale health-paper neutrals. Do not introduce unrelated blue, purple, coral, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: premium product design board with a left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and a bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples. Include a small ginger motif preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for health logs and apothecary screens. Include readable examples such as "生姜", "養生記録", "在庫", "今日の処方", "根の温度".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, recovery plan card, infusion timer card, apothecary inventory table, wellness trend chart, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle ginger skin ring-line dividers, fine rhizome fiber texture, warm paper surfaces, pink shoot highlight chips, leaf-green focus states, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, root-warm shadow, rhizome ring border, leaf focus ring.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no purple or blue gradients.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent Ginger motif and the visible Morphous Ginger light design-system board as source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation of the same shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system, titled exactly "Morphous Ginger". It must feel like the same grounded health system in dark mode, not a new motif.
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: night-mode grounded health system for herbal clinic operations, nutrition logs, apothecary inventory, recovery plans, batch tracking, wellness dashboards, and calm care-team review; earthy, restorative, precise, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the visible ginger motif: deep root-shadow brown and understory green backgrounds, warm tan panel borders, cream text, pink shoot accent states, fresh leaf green primary controls, muted clay blush alerts, sandy beige charts. No unrelated blue, purple, coral, neon, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: keep the same section coverage and product-board logic as the light board: left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples. Include a small ginger motif preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for ginger health logs and apothecary screens. Include readable examples such as "生姜", "養生記録", "在庫", "今日の処方", "根の温度". Do not use the words saffron, crocus, tea, flower, サフラン, クロッカス, or 茶葉 anywhere.
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, recovery plan card, infusion timer card, apothecary inventory table, wellness trend chart, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle dark ginger skin ring-line dividers, fine rhizome fiber texture, warm night paper surfaces, pink shoot highlight chips, leaf-green focus states, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained dark shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, root-night shadow, rhizome ring border, leaf focus ring.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no pure black flat background; no purple or blue gradients; no saffron or crocus references.
